meta.name: te9.dev Design System
meta.description: Design system for te9.dev — Patrick's Digital Garden. Extracted from the SvelteKit codebase and documented as a light theme. Vanilla CSS with semantic class names, zero external CSS dependencies, full accessibility.

heading.usage: Page titles, hero headings, section headings, card titles, logo

mono.usage: Navigation logo, section labels, footer logo, code text, link names, tags

body.usage: Body text, descriptions, button labels, subtitles, hero descriptions, card descriptions, nav links

fonts.loadHTML:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bricolage+Grotesque:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Lekton:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

icons.usage: Import as Svelte components: import { IconName } from '@lucide/svelte';

brand-bg-secondary.usage: Alternate section backgrounds, footer gradient end

accent.usage: Primary accent — CTAs, highlights, logo dot, section labels, nav active

accent-light.usage: Accent background tint, button hover bg

brand-muted.usage: Secondary text, descriptions, labels, footer tagline

brand-light.usage: Tertiary text, hero description, decorative elements (not AA compliant)

garden-green.usage: Garden icon color, tag pill color, card top border gradient start

garden-green-light.usage: Tag pill background, green tint backgrounds

garden-green-dark.usage: Tag text, green on light backgrounds requiring AA contrast

emerald.usage: Selection color, focus rings, scrollbar hover

white.usage: Card backgrounds, elevated surfaces, inverted text on accent

border-subtle.usage: Card borders, nav border, footer top border, section dividers

border-hover.usage: Card hover border, interactive hover borders

hero-xl.usage: Hero heading title (responsive, desktop up to 96px)

body-sm.usage: Card descriptions, UI text, nav links, footer text

1.usage: Tag horizontal padding, focus ring offset

2.usage: Button icon gap, scrollbar height, small icon gaps

2.5.usage: Nav link gap, hero label gap

3.usage: Small icon size, arrow offset, card header margin bottom

4.usage: Standard spacing, button icon shift, footer social gap

5.usage: Link item padding-y, fly transition y offset

6.usage: Button padding, card padding mobile, section margin bottom

8.usage: Card padding, page padding-x, grid gap, footer padding-x

12.usage: Section margin bottom, footer padding-top, footer main margin bottom

normal.usage: Hover transitions, slide transitions, default interactions

moderate.usage: Fly transitions, card entrance, fade in

fadeInUp.usage: Section reveal entrance, card stagger entrance

delay-1.usage: First card stagger, typing per character

delay-3.usage: Third item stagger, slide transition delay

delay-4.usage: Fourth item stagger, ring pulse stagger

delay-8.usage: Ring pulse stagger 3, view transition new

viewTransitionNew.usage: New content entrance delay after old exits

viewTransitions.description: 10 randomized page transition effects using View Transitions API

fadeInUp.description: Elements fade in and slide up from below

staggerChildren.description: Child elements animate in sequence with incremental delay
staggerChildren.usage: Garden card grid, quick links list

sectionReveal.description: Sections start hidden and animate in when scrolled into view

navUnderline.description: Navigation links show an underline on hover/active that grows from left

imageHoverScale.description: Images slightly scale up on parent hover
imageHoverScale.usage: Hero decoration rings, card hover effects

cardHoverReveal.description: Card top border grows from left on hover, accent glow appears

buttonSweep.description: Gradient sweep slides across button on hover

modalSlideUp.description: Modal slides up from below with backdrop fade

tagPillHover.description: Tag pill background darkens slightly on hover

scrollIndicator.description: Bouncing scroll indicator to prompt user interaction

reducedMotion.description: All animations disabled for users who prefer reduced motion
reducedMotion.behavior: Disable all keyframe animations, show final states, remove transitions

tablet.usage: Small tablets, link item column layout

container.usage: Garden section, links section, footer content

button.description: CTA buttons with primary (filled gradient), secondary (ghost), and outlined (border-only) variants. All use Lekton font, lowercase text.

sweepEffect.description: Gradient sweep slides left-to-right on hover (primary variant)

checkbox.description: Custom checkbox with accent color on check

radio.description: Custom radio button with accent color on select

gardenCard.description: Content card for the garden section with icon, title, description, and tag. Features top border grow on hover and radial glow.
gardenCard.structure:
Title

Description

tag

topBorderEffect.description: Gradient border grows from left on hover

radialGlowEffect.description: Subtle orange radial glow appears on hover

quickLink.description: External link item with name, description, and arrow icon. Translates on hover.

sectionHeader.description: Section label and optional title, centered. Label uses mono font with // prefix.

navbar.description: Fixed top navigation with typing logo effect, nav links, and scroll-aware blur background.

hero.description: Full-viewport hero with centered content, label brackets, accent dot, decorative pulsing rings.
hero.structure:
[ digital-garden ]

...

buttons
rings

decorationRings.description: 3 concentric circles that pulse with accent color on an 11s cycle

footer.description: Site footer with brand, navigation links, social icons, and status indicator.

backgroundEffects.description: Full-screen overlay effects: noise texture and CRT scanlines. Purely presentational, pointer-events none.

scanlines.background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 100%)

card.description: Generic content card with title and description

table.description: Data table with header styling and optional striped rows

list.description: Styled list with optional icons and spread layout

spread.description: Justify-content: space-between for label + badge layout

tabs.description: Tab navigation with active indicator and panel switching
tabs.structure:
Tab 1
Tab 2
Content
Content
tabs.behavior: Click toggles active class and shows/hides panels

modal.description: Accessible modal with backdrop blur, slide-up entrance, and ESC to close
modal.structure:
Title

Description

buttons

alert.description: Contextual feedback banners with icon and message

toast.description: Floating notification with shadow and icon

avatar.description: User avatar with initials or image

tag-pill.description: Category tag with optional hover state. Used in garden cards for category labels.

gridAndLayout.description: 8px base unit grid with responsive auto-fit columns and max-width containers
rules: 8px base unit, box-sizing: border-box on all elements
Auto-fit grid: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)) for garden cards
Flex column for quick links with 1rem gap

forms.description: Form stack layout with labeled inputs

navigation.description: Fixed navbar with scroll-aware background and blur

emptyLoadingErrorStates.description: Centered layout for empty, loading, and error states
emptyLoadingErrorStates.structure: Icon/emoji → heading (var(--font-heading), 600) → meta-text description → CTA button

sectionReveal.description: Intersection Observer-based reveal animation for below-fold sections
sectionReveal.js: new IntersectionObserver callback adds .revealed class, then unobserves

viewTransitions.description: Randomized page transition effects using the View Transitions API. 10 variants selected randomly on each navigation.
viewTransitions.implementation: On navigate: pick random variant, add transition-{variant} class to <html>, start view transition, remove class on finished

staggerEntrance.description: Child elements animate in with incremental delay for visual hierarchy

implementation.methodology: Vanilla CSS with :root custom properties. Svelte scoped styles in components. Tailwind used only for utility classes in templates (px-8, py-24, etc.)
implementation.noExternalCSSDependencies: Only Google Fonts <link> allowed. No CSS frameworks.
implementation.tailwindUsage: Tailwind utility classes used for layout in Svelte templates (flex, grid, padding, margin). Component styles use scoped <style> blocks.
implementation.mobileFirst: Responsive approach starts with mobile, adds breakpoints for larger screens.
implementation.sectionPadding: Use py-24 (6rem) for section vertical padding, px-8 (2rem) for horizontal
implementation.semanticClassNames: Use descriptive class names (.garden-card, .hero-content) not utility strings

color60_30_10.description: Dominant background, structural elements, and accent proportions

requirements: All body text must use #1A1A1A on light bg (15.3:1)
#9A9A9A is decorative only — never for meaningful text
Accent #E88500 used for large text (≥24px) or icons only on light bg
For small accent text, use #C47000 (5.1:1 — passes AA)
Button labels (#FFFFFF on #E88500) are ≥15px bold — passes AA large text

interactionStates.description: 5 required interaction states per interactive component

states.hover: Transition: all 300ms ease or cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1). Cards lift (translateY(-2px)), buttons shift.
states.active_pressed: Subtle visual feedback (scale down, darker shade)

spatialHierarchy.description: Spacing levels that communicate visual importance

micro.usage: Icon-to-label gaps, tag padding, focus ring offset

tight.usage: Button internal gaps, list item spacing, scrollbar

standard.usage: Card padding, page padding, footer gaps

comfortable.usage: Section margins, hero padding, major separations

layoutComposition.description: Three layout strategies depending on content needs

responsive.description: Fluid columns that scale with viewport using auto-fit/minmax
responsive.useFor: Garden card grid, editorial layouts, dashboards

adaptive.description: Fixed-width boxes that wrap at breakpoints
adaptive.useFor: Quick link list, fixed-width components, profile cards

strict.description: Horizontal scroll at threshold, no wrapping
strict.useFor: Data tables, code blocks, wide content

layoutComposition.decisionTree: If content widths are predictable → adaptive. If content should fill available space → responsive. If content must not wrap → strict.

usageGuidelines: Use var(--font-heading) for all headings and titles
Use var(--font-mono) for code, labels, nav logo, and technical text
Use var(--font-body) for body text, descriptions, and UI labels
Garden cards use border-radius: 0 for sharp terminal aesthetic
Quick links use border-radius: 8px for softer feel
Hero section must always use clamp() for responsive title sizing
Navigation links use lowercase text-transform consistently
All section labels use // prefix in JetBrains Mono
Accent dot (.) in te9.dev uses #E88500 always
Status indicators use green (#22C55E) for active/growing states

designPrinciples.name: Terminal Aesthetic
designPrinciples.why: The site evokes a developer's terminal — monospace labels, cursor blinks, prompt symbols (›), and sharp card edges.
designPrinciples.purpose: Creates a distinctive developer identity that feels technical yet approachable.
designPrinciples.usage: Use mono fonts for labels and navigation. Use sharp borders (radius-0) for content cards. Add prompt › before logo text.

designPrinciples.name: Organic Growth
designPrinciples.why: The digital garden metaphor — content grows over time, sections are 'seeded' not 'published'.
designPrinciples.purpose: Reflects the personal, evolving nature of the content.
designPrinciples.usage: Use green (#00A855) for growth indicators. Status dot pulses to show 'alive'. Tags use lowercase 'experiments', 'knowledge'.

designPrinciples.name: Warm Minimalism
designPrinciples.why: Clean layout with warm undertones — not cold/clinical, not maximalist.
designPrinciples.purpose: Makes the technical content feel approachable and personal.
designPrinciples.usage: Use warm off-white backgrounds (#F8F8F6, not pure white). Add subtle warmth to borders (#E0DDD8). Keep spacing generous.

designPrinciples.name: Accent Restraint
designPrinciples.why: Orange (#E88500) is used sparingly — labels, CTAs, and hover states only.
designPrinciples.purpose: Draws the eye to interactive elements without overwhelming.
designPrinciples.usage: Accent for: section labels, button primary, nav active, logo prompt. Never fill large areas with accent.

designPrinciples.name: Dual Accent System
designPrinciples.why: Orange for interaction, green for status/growth. Two distinct semantic channels.
designPrinciples.usage: Orange: buttons, links, labels, highlights. Green: status dots, garden icons, tags, card borders.

designPrinciples.name: Progressive Disclosure
designPrinciples.why: Content reveals itself as needed — stagger animations, hover reveals, scroll-triggered sections.
designPrinciples.purpose: Reduces cognitive load, creates visual rhythm.
designPrinciples.usage: Cards fly in on scroll. Top border grows on hover. Radial glow appears on hover. Section content reveals below fold.

designPrinciples.name: Motion with Purpose
designPrinciples.why: 10 view transition variants create delightful navigation. Each serves the same function differently.
designPrinciples.purpose: Navigation feels alive without being distracting.
designPrinciples.usage: Randomized transitions on page change. Consistent timing (250/550/800ms). Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

designPrinciples.name: Typographic Hierarchy
designPrinciples.why: Three font families create clear hierarchy: Bricolage (identity), JetBrains (technical), Lekton (narrative).
designPrinciples.purpose: Each font has a semantic role — heading, code, body.
designPrinciples.usage: Bricolage: page titles, hero, section headings. JetBrains: labels, logo, links. Lekton: descriptions, buttons, body text.

designPrinciples.name: Cultural Layering
designPrinciples.why: Noise overlay + scanlines add texture without reducing readability.
designPrinciples.purpose: Creates depth and a retro-digital atmosphere.
designPrinciples.usage: Noise at 2-3% opacity, scanlines at 6% opacity, pointer-events: none on both. Light theme uses even subtler effects.

designPrinciples.name: Consistent Interaction
designPrinciples.why: All interactive elements share the same hover pattern: translateY(-2px) + border/shadow change.
designPrinciples.usage: Cards, buttons, links all lift 2px on hover. All use 300ms transition. All show accent color on hover.

designPrinciples.name: Accessible First
designPrinciples.why: Focus rings, skip links, reduced motion, and AA contrast are non-negotiable.
designPrinciples.usage: Focus: 2px solid #E88500. Skip link at top. Reduced motion kills all animations. AA contrast for all meaningful text.

designPrinciples.name: Intentional Whitespace
designPrinciples.why: 6rem section padding, generous card padding, and centered content create breathing room.
designPrinciples.usage: Section py: 6rem. Card padding: 2rem. Hero min-height: calc(100vh - 60px). Content is centered by default.

boilerplate.description: Required starter code for implementing the design system
boilerplate.htmlStructure:
Skip to content
...
...
...
boilerplate.bodyCss: body { font-family: var(--font-body); background: var(--color-brand-bg); color: var(--color-brand-dark); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; }
boilerplate.skipLinkCss:
.skip-link { position: absolute; left: -9999px; top: auto; background: #FFFFFF; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; z-index: 10000; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 2px solid #E88500; }
.skip-link:focus { left: 1rem; top: 1rem; }
